auth_type: OAuth2 with PKCE or API Key + IP Whitelisting
auth_notes: Most Pharmacy Management Systems (PMS) like PioneerRx or PrimeRx require OAuth2.0. Due to HIPAA regulations, they often require Mutual TLS (mTLS), VPN tunnels, or strict IP whitelisting in addition to standard credentials.
rate_limits: Varies by provider; typically 10-20 requests per second with strict daily quotas.
gotchas: Data is frequently returned in XML or HL7 format rather than JSON, requiring heavy transformation.
Strict HIPAA compliance requires n8n to be hosted in a HIPAA-compliant environment (AWS Nitro/Azure Healthcare).
Production access often requires a signed Business Associate Agreement (BAA) before API keys are issued.
research_notes: Integration will rely heavily on the HTTP Request node. Expect to use the 'XML' or 'HTML' nodes to parse legacy responses. If the system uses HL7 over MLLP, a middleman proxy or custom Node.js script in a Function node will be required as n8n does not natively support MLLP.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration will rely heavily on the HTTP Request node. Expect to use the 'XML' or 'HTML' nodes to parse legacy responses. If the system uses HL7 over MLLP, a middleman proxy or custom Node.js script in a Function node will be required as n8n does not natively support MLLP.
